---
title: "The Rev. Charles Francis Lysaght Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Charles Francis Lysaght Yonge

**Dates:** (1858-1933)

### Description

cousin of CMY, Rector of Shottisham, Suffolk

### Biography

At the time of the 1901 census he was living with his mother, his sisters Elizabeth and Margaret, and his aunt Anne, the 90-year-old widow of the writer Charles Duke Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
